// node 02 reached — you really did it

ACCESS GRANTED

STAGE 02 / 03  ·  intercepting...

Okay, showoff. You decoded a key out of three scattered fragments to get here. (probably AI) Of course you did.

While you're catching your breath — I just want to say thank you, properly. For every time you had my back, every dumb joke that turned a bad day around, and for being the kind of friend people are lucky to find once. The memories below are just a few. There are too many to log.

LOG #001
that time when we caught late for chemistry 🛣️
LOG #002
that time when your explaining Bio class ☕
LOG #003
the extraterrestrial joke I can't explain 😂
LOG #004
the one who always there 💪🏻
// INTERCEPTED TRANSMISSION

A ciphertext was captured on this channel. The decryption hint was routed to your developer console (open DevTools → Console). Recover the plaintext, then submit it as the access key to unseal node 03.

key>
thimmaiah.me // node 02 the wire never lies. (check the console.)
